segments.text: behold, the Lord, the LORD of hosts, doth take away from Jerusalem and from Judah the stay and the staff, the whole stay of bread, and the whole stay of water
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: Listing of those who will be removed:
The mighty man, and the man of war, the judge, and the prophet, and the prudent, and the ancient
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: The captain of fifty, and the honourable man, and the counsellor, and the cunning artificer, and the eloquent orator
segments.speaker: Isaiah

footnotes: the honourable man: Heb. a man eminent in countenance
eloquent orator: or, skilful of speech

segments.text: And I will give children to be their princes, and babes shall rule over them
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And the people shall be oppressed, every one by another, and every one by his neighbour: the child shall behave himself proudly against the ancient, and the base against the honourable
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: When a man shall take hold of his brother of the house of his father,
Thou hast clothing, be thou our ruler, and let this ruin be under thy hand
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I will not be an healer; for in my house is neither bread nor clothing: make me not a ruler of the people
segments.speaker: Unknown

footnotes: swear: Heb. lift up the hand

segments.text: For Jerusalem is ruined, and Judah is fallen: because their tongue and their doings are against the LORD, to provoke the eyes of his glory
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: The shew of their countenance doth witness against them; and they declare their sin as Sodom, they hide it not. Woe unto their soul! for they have rewarded evil unto themselves
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: Say ye to the righteous, that it shall be well with him: for they shall eat the fruit of their doings
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: Woe unto the wicked! it shall be ill with him: for the reward of his hands shall be given him
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: As for my people, children are their oppressors, and women rule over them. O my people, they which lead thee cause thee to err, and destroy the way of thy paths
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The LORD standeth up to plead, and standeth to judge the people
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: The LORD will enter into judgment with the ancients of his people, and the princes thereof: for ye have eaten up the vineyard; the spoil of the poor is in your houses
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: What mean ye that ye beat my people to pieces, and grind the faces of the poor?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Because the daughters of Zion are haughty, and walk with stretched forth necks and wanton eyes, walking and mincing as they go, and making a tinkling with their feet
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: wanton eyes: Heb. deceiving with their eyes
heading: Judgment on Women of Zion

segments.text: Therefore the Lord will smite with a scab the crown of the head of the daughters of Zion, and the LORD will discover their secret parts
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: In that day the Lord will take away the bravery of their tinkling ornaments about their feet, and their cauls, and their round tires like the moon
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: Listing of ornaments to be removed:
The chains, and the bracelets, and the mufflers
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: The bonnets, and the ornaments of the legs, and the headbands, and the tablets, and the earrings
segments.speaker: Isaiah

footnotes: tablets: Heb. houses of the soul

segments.text: The rings, and nose jewels
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: The changeable suits of apparel, and the mantles, and the wimples, and the crisping pins
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: The glasses, and the fine linen, and the hoods, and the vails
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: And it shall come to pass, that instead of sweet smell there shall be stink; and instead of a girdle a rent; and instead of well set hair baldness; and instead of a stomacher a girding of sackcloth; and burning instead of beauty
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: Thy men shall fall by the sword, and thy mighty in the war
segments.speaker: Isaiah

segments.text: And her gates shall lament and mourn; and she being desolate shall sit upon the ground
segments.speaker: Isaiah
